title: Review of Ofsted’s electronic evidence gathering (EEG) application
body: "Following reports of technical issues with the EEG system last year, His Majesty’s Chief Inspector commissioned an internal review to look at the issues and consider appropriate actions and mitigations. The review covers the period from March 2019 to May 2024.  This internal review is published for transparency.  "

taxons.title: Inspections and performance of education providers
